productDisplayName: Nike Men White & Yellow Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteWith legendary cushioning and absolute support, the nike Air Pegasus+ 28 running shoe works great for mild under pronators and over pronators. Replete with low-profile cushioning and ample ventilation, the Nike Air Pegasus+ 28 features a Nike+ option that allows you to use Nike+ compatible iPods, stop watches and more to clock your fitness regime. It's equipped with Flywire technology (Flywire is made of thin nylon fibers that are ultra-strong and ultra-lightweight for support that won't weigh you down) for premium support and a segmented crash pad to absorb shock. Product DetailsMeshed upper for maximum ventilation with synthetic overlaysAn inner bootie that wraps around the foot offering a snug, breathable, comfort FitStrategically placed synthetic overlays with added TPU skeleton at the back foot for better shoe structure, full range of motion and secure fitFlywire technology for premium, lightweight support and an external heel counter to wrap the heel for a snug, secure fitLace-up system and padded mesh sockliner for snug, breathable fit with a cushioned sockliner that moulds to the foot, offering a custom fit and great supportReflective elements for enhanced visibility in low light conditions and premium Cushlon foam midsole for soft, responsive cushioning and supportNike Zoom unit in the heel for low-profile, responsive cushioning and a segmented crash pad for shock absorption, delivering a smooth rideDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs for maximum traction and stabilityHeel pad made of BRS 1000 rubber for abrasion resistanceToe guard reinforced for forefoot protectionMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
